tools.name: social_lookup_profile
tools.description:
Use this when you need public profile data from a social media handle or URL. Returns structured profile data in JSON.

Returns: 1. displayName and bio 2. avatarUrl 3. followerCount and followingCount 4. postCount 5. location and website 6. createdAt (account creation date) 7. isVerified (boolean) 8
